value.found_quote: Google DeepMind Evals : Multiple standardized benchmarking tools for different types on models ... Gemini Evaluations Playbook : Recipes for experimenting and evaluating generative AI models with Vertex AI. ... Gen AI evaluation service and API
value.rationale: The page, published by Google (Chrome for Developers), explicitly references multiple Google-offered evals/testing tools: "Google DeepMind Evals" (standardized benchmarking tools for models), "Gemini Evaluations Playbook" (for evaluating generative AI models with Vertex AI), and a "Gen AI evaluation service and API" listed among eval tools. These substantiate that Google offers evals/testing harness capabilities for evaluating AI model behavior. The confidence is medium rather than high because the page is a resource/links page for a course rather than a dedicated product page, and it does not explicitly describe running test suites against an "agent's" behavior specifically — though the overall context of the evals course covers evaluation of AI systems.
